title: Mildly Spicy Thai Tofu Kanom Ko
description: A spicy and snappy Thai dish featuring tofu in a flavorful sauce, served in a molcajete vessel and cooked to perfection in a tandoor, perfect for a cozy dinner

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Preheat the tandoor to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together the curry paste, coconut milk, fish sauce, brown sugar, salt, and pepper to make the sauce
Heat the oil in the molcajete vessel over medium heat
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute
Add the cubed tofu and cook until it is golden brown
Pour the sauce into the molcajete vessel and stir to combine
Transfer the molcajete vessel to the preheated tandoor and cook for 15 minutes
Remove the vessel from the tandoor and let it cool for a few minutes
Serve the Mildly Spicy Thai Tofu Kanom Ko hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro
